name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent scheduling of safety inspections causes compliance issues and potential fines. We automate scheduling and logging instead of manual scheduling and tracking of inspections.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of safety inspections leads to compliance issues and potential fines.
